library.name: fetch
library.notes: WHATWG fetch target for browser-like and Node-compatible runtimes.

url.scheme.message: Target only supports HTTP(S) request URLs.

headers.unsafeWhen: Duplicate header names may be coalesced by generated JavaScript header structures.

body.multipart.message: fetch supports multipart bodies through FormData.

auth.basic.message: fetch can send basic auth through the Authorization header.

cookies.inline.message: Browser fetch runtimes may reject explicit Cookie headers.
cookies.inline.unsafeWhen: Generated code runs in a browser or fetch runtime that forbids Cookie headers.

cookies.jar.message: fetch cannot load curl cookie jar files.

proxy.message: fetch does not expose curl-style per-request proxy selection.

tls.verify.message: fetch does not expose per-request TLS verification controls.

tls.ca.message: fetch does not expose per-request TLS CA controls.

tls.client-cert.message: fetch does not expose TLS client certificate controls.

network.message: fetch does not expose curl-style network binding or connection routing.

dns.message: fetch does not expose curl-style DNS resolver overrides.

redirects.message: fetch supports redirect modes but not curl's full redirect policy.

timeout.message: fetch requires AbortController or a helper for timeouts.

http.version.2.message: fetch does not expose HTTP/2 selection.

http.version.3.message: fetch does not expose HTTP/3 selection.

debug.message: fetch output cannot reproduce curl verbose or trace wire dumps.

external-ref.message: Browser fetch cannot access local external references.
